api_access.conditions: API access is governed by separate Meta Platform Terms and Developer Policies. Developers must agree to those additional terms.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated data collection, scraping, or harvesting of content or data from Meta products is prohibited without explicit written authorization.

post_content.conditions: By posting content, users grant Meta a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, distribute, and display that content across Meta products. Content must comply with Meta's Community Standards and applicable policies.

read_content.conditions: Access to Facebook content requires agreement to Meta's Terms of Service. Content is subject to privacy settings of individual users and Meta's community standards.

allow_training.conditions: Meta uses personal data and user interactions to train and improve its AI/ML systems, including for personalized advertising and content recommendations. Users may have limited opt-out options via privacy settings.

create_account.conditions: Users must provide accurate information, meet minimum age requirements, and agree to Meta's Terms of Service. Only one personal account per person is permitted.

make_purchases.conditions: Purchases may be made through Facebook Marketplace and other Meta commerce features. Additional commerce and payment terms may apply.
